title: My Sister-In-Law Faked Terminal Cancer, Stole My $280K Home. So I Sent Her Tax Bills
description: After my husband Jack died, his sister faked terminal cancer to steal my $280,000 paid-off home. I proved her trust termination was a forgery, reclaimed the house, and now I mail her the tax bills every month. #RevengeStory #FamilyBetrayal #TrueStory
thumb_text: SHE FAKED CANCER STOLE MY HOME I MAIL TAX BILLS
pinned_comment: If your sister-in-law faked terminal cancer and stole your $280,000 paid-off home, would you mail her tax bills every month, or would you do something different? Tell us your story in the comments.

thumb_lines.text: SHE SOLD MY PAID OFF HOUSE AND KEPT THE CASH
AND ASKED HER TO STAND UP
